div.p: Direct ping only: FP rate = packet_loss_rate
With k=3 indirect probes: FP rate = packet_loss_rate^(k+1)
Direct path fails (packet loss / network issue)
Origin sends ping-req to k=3 random peers (excluding self/target)
Helpers probe target via their own network paths
Result: Target is ALIVE 2 of 3 helpers confirmed reachability. Origin marks B as ALIVE. Only 1 successful response needed!
